_spawn_seed_comment: Independent seed root for gep/spawner.py. Kept separate from global_seed so retuning entity spawns can never perturb the map's physical layout, and vice versa.
_autosave_comment: Ticks between flushing connected players to the database. Bounds how much progress an unclean shutdown can lose. 0 disables.
_default_equipment_comment: The equipment state a player occupies with nothing in main_hand. Must name an entry in config/weapons/. Not a fallback branch -- it is resolved through the same registry lookup as any other equipment.
